mode: ask
description: Evaluate a lab spec for structural quality and rulebook compliance
---

[agents/spec-quality-evaluator.md](../../agents/spec-quality-evaluator.md)

Evaluate the attached lab spec for structural quality using the agent definition above. This covers section-by-section evaluation and cross-section synthesis.

**Fill in before running:**
- Target task: [e.g., "help an agent query MongoDB using Atlas Search"]

Attach the spec file from `labs/specs/` using #file before sending.
Output saves to `labs/reports/{name}/{name}-spec-quality-eval-v{N}.md`.
